---
title: cyclomatic
description: "Limit independent control-flow paths."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Limit independent control-flow paths. Strider default: maximum 10.

## Bad

```go
func tangled() { /* more than ten independent branches */ }
```

## Good

```go
func sign(n int) int { if n < 0 { return -1 }; return 1 }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only cyclomatic`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
